name: Baked Graham-Cracker Crumb Crust (9 Inch)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F. If you would like to make your own graham-cracker crumbs, pulverize crackers in a blender or food processor with the knife blade attached as manufacturer directs; or place them in a sturdy plastic bag and roll into fine crumbs with a rolling pin.
2. In a pie plate or bowl, mix crumbs with remaining ingredients. If desired, set aside 3 tablespoons of mixture for topping. With your hands, press the mixture onto the bottom and up the side of the pie plate.
3. Bake crust for 8 minutes; cool on a wire rack. Fill as directed by the recipe, or with chilled pie filling; top with reserved crumb mixture or garnish as directed by the recipe.
